content.en:
"It's a treasure, there are a lot of resources here, and I don't know a lot of resources and treasures!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

If these resources were taken away, his cultivation would inevitably increase very quickly.

In addition, he also found the Nine Extremes Golden Lotus, but the Nine Extremes Golden Lotus was guarded by more than a dozen creatures comparable to the Triple Origin Ancestor, and he couldn't take the Nine Extremes Golden Lotus, unless his strength could be improved to the Triple Origin Ancestor realm, he could easily take the Nine Extremes Golden Lotus.

"I'm not in a hurry to get the Nine Extremes Golden Lotus first, I don't need this thing. I'll take the resources of that treasure land little by little and use them to improve my strength. "

Ye Tian decided.

In the following years, Ye Tian often consulted the Lord of the Unbounded, and obtained a lot of treasure books and information from the Lord of the Unbounded.

This is a huge help in identifying treasures and can save time in research.

But as for what the Nine Extremes Golden Lotus does, Ye Tian was still unclear, unless he could deduce the Extreme Dao to the level of the Extreme Extreme Dao, he could deduce the effects of the Nine Extremes Golden Lotus.

......

Airplanes!

Ye Tian dragged his seriously injured body out of the treasure land, and as a result, several terrifying creatures also rushed out of the treasure land and caught up with Ye Tian.

Ye Tian's other replica body appeared, dragging these creatures, which allowed the seriously injured replica body to escape.

The reason why I did this was to keep the resources I had captured!

Soon after, the creatures were repelled by the primordial Black Sea and returned to the treasure.

It can be said that no matter what kind of species it is, if it does not comprehend the extreme path of time and space, it will not be able to stay in the primordial Black Sea forever.

Of course, if the number of extreme extremes of comprehension is large enough, it will be almost infinite to stay in the primordial Black Sea.

However, the creatures of this treasure land only contained one extreme extreme, but the race was special, so their strength was comparable to that of the Triple Primordial Ancestor, so they could only stay in the Primordial Black Sea for a few minutes.

"It worked!"

"The Fruit of No Flame can greatly improve the cultivation of the Triple Primordial Ancestor, and has a weak effect on the Triple Primordial Ancestor. "

"The Golden Phoenix Void Grass can enhance the Extreme Dao will of the Dual Origin Ancestor, and it also has an effect on the Triple Ancestor. "

"The Black Feather Stone can be used to create the Primordial Divine Weapon. "

Treasures appeared in Ye Tian's hands, and this harvest was very good.

Immediately, Ye Tian took out the treasures that could improve his cultivation and took them one by one.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian's cultivation improved rapidly, far surpassing the speed of his previous cultivation.

When the treasures obtained were exhausted, Ye Tian entered the treasure land again, but this time he was unlucky, surrounded by several extremely powerful creatures, and did not escape in time, and fell into the treasure land.

In this way, Ye Tian tried again and again, obtained more and more treasures, and his cultivation was naturally getting higher and higher.

The Lord of the Boundless had no idea that Ye Tian, the Dual Ancestor, would be able to capture the treasure in that treasure land and dare to enter it again and again.

After all, even if it is a dual ancestor with a will clone, it will take a long time to recover if he loses a clone, and if he dies too many times, it will affect the foundation of will.

But these rules and regulations are not suitable for Ye Tian at all, even if Ye Tian's copy body dies many times, it will not have any effect.

After a long period of time, Ye Tian's cultivation was finally raised to the limit of the Dual Ancestor in only six tens of billions of eternal years under the accumulation of one treasure after another.

At this time, he felt the existence of a bottleneck, and he only needed to engrave the Extreme Space Extreme Dao on the Pagoda of Will, and he could impact the Triple Origin Ancestor Realm.

"Twenty-one Will, let's first engrave the black text representing the extreme path of the Extreme Space on the first layer of the Will!"

Ye Tian decided.

He made a breakthrough in the dojo of the primordial Black Sea, without telling anyone, and naturally he didn't want to be known by the Lord of the Unbounded.

Airplanes!

Layers of Will Pagoda appeared on Ye Tian's body, as if this area was enveloped.

"Let's start carving!"

Ye Tian decided.

This black text is equivalent to containing an inscription, and Ye Tian has already understood it.

Rumble!

Under Ye Tian's control, the power of the Extreme Space Extreme Dao began to be engraved on the first layer of the Will Pagoda.

He has a fifty percent success rate, and even if he fails the first time, the impact is not great.

Time passed slowly, and everything went smoothly.

Just as the inscription was about to be successful, the black text suddenly clashed with the Pagoda of Will.

Click!

The Pagoda of Will cracked.

"Failed!"

Ye Tian muttered.

If it were anyone else, it would have taken a long time to repair the crack in the Pagoda of Will, or buy an incomparably precious Arcana to repair the crack.

Of course, you can also ignore it and continue to make breakthroughs, but this will have a lower success rate, and once you continue to inscribe and fail, the rift will be even bigger, and it may even lead to the destruction of the foundation of the Pagoda of Will.

When the time comes, he will never be able to break through to the Triple Ancestor Realm.

"I don't need to fix it!"

Ye Tian directly annihilated this replica body, and then re-copied a replica body.

This Will's Pagoda that copied his body was intact, and he could continue to impact the Triple Ancestor Realm.

"The success rate doesn't mean anything to me!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But the reason why he still wanted the Void Inscription Technique was not for himself, but for the sake of the Terrans, and the Void Inscription Technique could be used as the foundation of the Terrans!

Subsequently, Ye Tian continued to engrave the black text representing the extreme path of the extreme space on the Will Pagoda.

This time, Ye Tian's luck was not so bad, and he succeeded in directly inscribed.

After all, the success rate is fifty percent, and if you fail twice, it will be too unlucky!

After the inscription was successful, the black text was integrated into the first layer of the Pagoda of Will.

Rumble!

The Will Pagoda began to transform, becoming more tenacious and powerful, and Ye Tian's Extreme Dao will was also skyrocketing, and the original ancestor's body also began to transform.

His shackles had disappeared, and his cultivation was rapidly improving, frantically devouring the energy of the Primordial Black Sea.

After a long period of time, Ye Tian devoured a huge amount of primordial black sea energy, and finally completely stabilized his cultivation in the realm of the Triple Primordial Ancestor.

"Let's continue to engrave the words that represent the extreme of time!"

Ye Tian decided.

After all, the Triple Ancestor could engrave nine extreme paths, and there were more than nine extreme paths he had comprehended.

Moreover, the other Triple Ancestors did not dare to be afraid of the failure of the inscription, and he was not afraid, so he directly continued to engrave.
